case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. BRIAN TIANO

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TIANO, BRIAN
